final:
module eeprom_cell (
    input wire write_enable,
    input wire data_in,
    output reg data_out
);
  wire _tap_write_enable = write_enable & {1{1'b1}};

    always @(*) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            data_out = data_in; // Store the value when writing
        end
    end
endmodule
